given: a warehouse operator viewing the SKU detail view for a SKU whose par level is not tracked
when: the par level detail is read
then: an explicit "not tracked" indication is shown in place of the par level, with no blank region and no error

independence.rationale: AC1 and AC2 cover the SKU's locations and tracking code; this adds the distinct outcome that the untracked par level renders as a clear 'not tracked' state, which can fail (blank or crash on the null) while locations and tracking codes still display correctly.
